node.name: Group 1171281701 — Why Bodhi School of Yoga / What We Stand For

columns.name: Background (image card)
columns.content: Hero photograph: women practicing yoga outdoors in a park with 'Yoga in the Park — Breathe. Stretch. Connect.' signboard

columns.name: Container
columns.notes: Contains heading, subhead, 'What We Stand For' heading, the 5-item bullet list, and a wider (691px) green CTA banner that overflows the 611px column

background.sectionBackground: page surface (inherits parent — no explicit fill on 1:91/1:92)

supportingCopy.text: We Empower Women to Heal, Lead, and Rise—Physically, Emotionally, and Spiritually—through the transformative wisdom of Yoga.

valuePropList.layout: single-column vertical list, each row separated by 1px horizontal border rgba(86,147,65,0.15); first row has both top and bottom borders, subsequent rows only bottom border

bullet.verticalAlignmentNote: bullet sits inside a 6x13 wrapper with 7px top padding to align with text baseline

items.text: Making yoga accessible & empowering for every woman
Offering accredited TTCs that reflect women's unique needs
Creating a safe space for healing, leadership & sisterhood
Supporting women to rise personally & professionally
Growing a global network of empowered yoginis

title.text: Whether you're a seeker or a teacher — you belong here.

subtitle.text: Transform your career, Bodhi is here to guide and support you at every step.

assets.intrinsicSizeNote: Rendered at 176.07% width / 105.26% height with left offset -38.03% inside a 546x685 rounded card — image is cropped/zoomed; export at high resolution (>= 1100x1100) so the crop stays sharp

tokenMapping.bullet square #569341: brand-primary (green) — same brand green used for the divider borders at 15% opacity
tokenMapping.row divider rgba(86,147,65,0.15): border-border-brand-subtle (brand-primary at 15%) — or use a neutral border-border-subtle token if brand-on-neutral exists
tokenMapping.CTA banner background #009877: brand-secondary / brand-teal (NOT brand-primary #569341 — this is a distinct teal accent)
tokenMapping.CTA banner title color #faf6ef: bg-surface-cream / on-brand text — same as cream page surface used inverted

spacing.ctaWidthOverflow: CTA banner is 691px wide while text column is 611px — it overhangs the right column by 80px (likely extends back across the gap toward the image card). Verify in implementation.

implementationNotes.responsiveGuidance: On <lg breakpoints, stack the image card above the content. Maintain 5-item single-column list. CTA banner should match the content column width on mobile (avoid 691px overflow).
implementationNotes.accessibility: Decorative hero image — empty alt. Bullet list should be semantic <ul>/<li>. CTA banner is informational, not a link in this design (no interactiveElements detected). Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for #faf6ef on #009877 (passes for 22px bold) and 3:1 for rgba(255,255,255,0.68) on #009877 (subtitle — verify, may need to bump opacity).
